_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
min_doctor_qualification: MCh/DNB or Equivalent (in Urology, Pediatric Surgery)
clinical_indications: Urine flowing backwards into the kidneys ("reflux")

preauth.label: Discharge Summary from last admission for Bladder diverticulectomy surgery

claim.label: Current visit clinical notes with evaluation findings

ppd_preauth.q: Were the Detailed Clinical notes with history, indications, symptoms, signs, examination findings and advice for admission submitted?
Was the USG / CT /MRI abdomen/MCU report showing diverticula submitted?
Was the Discharge Summary of last admission for Bladder diverticulectomy surgery submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Were the indoor case papers and treatment given detail submitted?
Were the detailed procedure/operative notes submitted?
Was the Post-operative USG abdomen report submitted?
Were the current visit clinical notes with evaluation findings submitted?
Was the Detailed Discharge Summary with all the details submitted?

common_queries: Clinical notes of the current visit or earlier discharge summary for bladder diverticulectomy not available for the follow-up case.
Discharge Summary from last admission for Bladder diverticulectomy surgery missing at pre-authorization.
Current visit clinical notes with evaluation findings missing or incomplete at claim submission.

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed with Bladder Diverticulectomy only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation:
